rationale: The cited paper provides a theory and mechanisms of dishonesty (self-concept maintenance, moral attention, categorization malleability), while the citing paper studies under/overreporting in sensitive self-reports and models behavioral reporting effects. Given this clear conceptual overlap and the possibility that the 2008 paper serves as a theory/mechanism foundation (despite only DOI-level match evidence and no local citation context), this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
